series_metadata.series_description: All financial and programmatic records related to the receipt and expenditure of federal grant funding including, but not limited to, grant applications and supporting documentation; award and acceptance forms; financial reports including budgets, cash requests, expenditures, and source documentation; records of purchase and/or acquisiton; project information; use agreements; and relevant audit reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current year three years from date of federal "Final Financial Report" applicable grant and State Single Audit has been completed. ; Electronic: current year three years from date of federal "Final Financial Report" applicable grant and State Single Audit has been completed
